title: remijia macrophylla
intro: Remijia macrophylla, also known as the "False Pau'rra" or "False Pau-rra", is a tropical plant species native to South America, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Its health benefits are said to include the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Remijia macrophylla often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves or roots, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application for wound healing.
